top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM cards 
JOIN sets ON cards.setCode = sets.code 
WHERE sets.name = 'Coldsnap' 
  AND cards.convertedManaCost > 5 
  AND (cards.power IS NULL OR cards.power = '');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM cards 
JOIN sets ON cards.setCode = sets.code 
WHERE sets.name = 'Coldsnap' 
  AND cards.convertedManaCost > 5 
  AND (cards.power IS NULL OR cards.power = '');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM cards c
JOIN sets s ON c.setCode = s.code
WHERE s.code = 'Coldsnap' 
  AND c.convertedManaCost > 5 
  AND (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM cards 
JOIN sets ON cards.setCode = sets.code 
WHERE sets.code = 'CSD' 
  AND cards.convertedManaCost > 5 
  AND (cards.power = '' OR cards.power IS NULL);

SELECT COUNT(*)

  AND c.convertedManaCost > 5
  AND c.power IS NULL;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM cards 
JOIN sets ON cards.setCode = sets.code 
WHERE sets.name = 'Coldsnap' 
  AND cards.convertedManaCost > 5 
  AND (cards.power IS NULL OR cards.power = '');
